best_lean_code:
def longestValidParentheses (s : String) : Nat :=
  let chars := s.toList
  let n := chars.length
  
  if n = 0 then 0
  else
    let rec findMax (i : Nat) (stack : List Nat) (maxLen : Nat) : Nat :=
      if i >= n then maxLen
      else
        let c := chars.get! i
        if c = '(' then
          findMax (i + 1) (i :: stack) maxLen
        else
          match stack with
          | [] => 
            findMax (i + 1) [i] maxLen
          | _ :: rest =>
            let newStack := rest
            let base := match newStack with
              | [] => i
              | h :: _ => h
            let currentLen := i + 1 - base
            findMax (i + 1) newStack (max maxLen currentLen)
    termination_by n - i
    findMax 0 [0] 0
